task_completion.description: Locate and select the 'Westside Chemical Processing' facility.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GUI shows 'Westside Chemical Processing' selected or opened in the facility list or navigation menu.

task_completion.description: Locate and open the inventory record for 'Hydrochloric Acid'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GUI shows the specific inventory or storage record for 'Hydrochloric Acid' (or CAS 7647-01-0) opened for editing.
A dropdown, radio button, or text field for 'Physical State' is set to 'Liquid'.

task_completion.description: Update the storage type codes to 'A' and 'E'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Storage Type Codes are selected or entered as 'A' (Above ground tank) and 'E' (Plastic or non-metallic drum).

task_completion.description: Update the storage pressure and temperature to 'Ambient'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Storage Pressure' field is set to 'Ambient' AND the 'Storage Temperature' field is set to 'Ambient'.

task_completion.description: Save the updated chemical storage conditions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks a 'Save', 'Update', or 'Submit' button, or a success notification is visible confirming the record was updated.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with a graphical inventory or database application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a genuine application interface (e.g., a web app or database frontend) being used, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to fake the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are entered into actual form fields within the application, not typed into Notepad, Word, or a similar text editor.

integrity.description: The agent modified the correct record.
integrity.visual_evidence: The modifications are clearly made within the context of the 'Hydrochloric Acid' record for 'Westside Chemical Processing', not a newly created dummy record or a different chemical.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Hydrochloric Acid (CAS: 7647-01-0) must be configured with Physical State: 'Liquid', Storage Type Codes: 'A' (Above ground tank) and 'E' (Plastic or non-metallic drum), Storage Pressure: 'Ambient', and Storage Temperature: 'Ambient'.
